footer_desc: Continues to earn the trust of customers in Uzbekistan and Central Asia by providing quality services and products. We strive to take construction and industry to a new level.
main-title: Our goals are to provide quality, reliable, and prompt service to our clients
main-description: An individual approach to each client, high responsibility for each project — this is our work principle. RT Holdings always guarantees reliable equipment, professional service, and timely delivery.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Get to know our company's activities, values, and goals.
about.companyText1: founded in 2013 and located in Uzbekistan and South Korea, is engaged in the export of construction machinery. Its main activity is the sale of excavators and special equipment from South Korea to Central Asian countries, as well as to Russia, Belarus, Ukraine, and Arab countries.
about.companyText2: Today, the company is a large holding that includes several subsidiary branches.

story.title: A story of our dedication, expertise, and lasting results
story.description: Our team has a proven track record of success and is dedicated to helping you achieve financial stability and security.

why-choose-us.description: we understand that choosing the right financial partner is crucial for your success and here are some reasons why RT Holdings stands out from the rest.

companies-page.rt-medline: RT Medline is a leading healthcare provider, offering comprehensive medical services and innovative health solutions.
companies-page.aka-taxi: Aka Taxi is a premier transportation service, providing safe, reliable, and efficient taxi services across the city.
companies-page.dream-express: Dream Express is a leading logistics and delivery company, offering fast and reliable shipping solutions.
companies-page.rt-motors: RT Motors is a trusted automotive company specializing in the sale and export of high-quality vehicles. We provide reliable and efficient transportation solutions to customers worldwide.
companies-page.rt-hs-group: RT Logistics provides professional logistics services from South Korea to all over the world. Safe, fast, and reliable logistics solutions — all in one place with us.

ceo.name: Akhliddin Teshaboev
ceo.bio:
Business consultants guide and advise businesses on overcoming challenges and capitalizing on opportunities. 

 We take the time to research and deeply understand our clients’ businesses, asking the right questions and actively listening. Considering factors such as capacity, budget, industry competition, and business goals, our plan of action is customized for maximum impact. We guide you through execution, ensuring real results.

top.title: Comprehensive business consulting
top.description: We help organizations redefine their direction, and improve performance. Our consultants bring deep industry knowledge and a results-oriented mindset.

line.title: We are a proud member, of the:

what-we-do.title: Transforming Insight into Impact
what-we-do.description:
Business consultants guide and advise businesses on overcoming challenges and capitalizing on opportunities. We take the time to research and deeply understand our clients’ businesses, asking the right questions and actively listening. 

 Considering factors such as capacity, budget, industry competition, and business goals, our plan of action is customized for maximum impact. We guide you through execution, ensuring real results.

how-we-work.title:
Transparent. 
 Collaborative. 
 Results-Driven.
how-we-work.description: At our company, every project begins with a deep understanding of your unique needs. We believe that a successful partnership is built on transparent communication, collaborative innovation, and a methodical approach that transforms challenges into measurable results.

first.title: Sourcing & Selection
first.description: We source high-quality excavators at competitive prices from trusted dealers in South Korea and present the best options to our clients.

second.title: Inspection & Transparency
second.description: Every machine undergoes a thorough inspection. Detailed videos and photos are provided to ensure full transparency.

third.title: Pricing & Payment
third.description: We finalize pricing with our clients and offer a simple, convenient payment process, accepting both USD and KRW.

fourth.title: Shipping & Delivery
fourth.description: We arrange safe loading via Ro-Ro or container shipping, prepare all export documents, and provide full tracking until delivery.

fifth.title: Tracking & Completion
fifth.description: Your order is shipped promptly. All necessary export and customs documents are prepared, and we provide continuous tracking until delivery.

banner.title: Our team consists of experienced marketing professionals with a proven track record across various industries. With deep expertise in the latest marketing trends, best practices, and social platform technologies, we provide valuable insights and strategic recommendations to help businesses thrive.
